tasks.title: Set Up Multi-User Infrastructure
tasks.description: Implement multi-user model with campaign membership and roles.
tasks.details:
1. Update `prisma/schema.prisma` to include `CampaignMember` and `CampaignInvite` models.
2. Implement role-based verification in `src/server/lib/ownership.ts`.
3. Add `campaignMemberProcedure` middleware in `src/server/trpc.ts`.
4. Create members sub-router in `src/server/routers/campaigns.ts`.
5. Extend session with role info in `src/lib/auth.ts`.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify user roles and permissions through unit tests and integration tests for campaign membership.

tasks.title: Implement Global Search
tasks.description: Develop a global search feature across all content types.
tasks.details:
1. Extend MeiliSearch integration to index sessions, NPCs, homebrew, transcripts, etc.
2. Create a unified search endpoint in `src/server/routers/search.ts`.
3. Implement search command palette in `src/components/GlobalSearch.tsx`.
tasks.testStrategy: Perform search queries and validate results across different content types. Ensure search is responsive and accurate.

tasks.title: Develop Player Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard for players to manage characters and campaigns.
tasks.details:
1. Design `/dashboard` page in `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`.
2. Display list of characters and campaigns.
3. Provide quick access to active sessions.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct user testing to ensure dashboard usability and accessibility on mobile devices.

tasks.title: Build Character Sheet Management
tasks.description: Enable players to manage their character sheets.
tasks.details:
1. Implement character model in `prisma/schema.prisma`.
2. Develop character sheet UI in `src/app/characters/[id]/page.tsx`.
3. Integrate D&D Beyond sync functionality.
tasks.testStrategy: Test character creation, updates, and D&D Beyond sync. Validate data integrity and UI responsiveness.

tasks.title: Create Campaign Join Flow
tasks.description: Allow players to join campaigns via invite codes or email.
tasks.details:
1. Implement join flow in `src/app/campaigns/[id]/join/page.tsx`.
2. Handle invite code and email invite logic.
3. Allow character selection or creation for campaign.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate joining campaigns with valid and invalid invites. Verify character association with campaigns.

tasks.title: Implement Co-DM Features
tasks.description: Enable collaboration between DMs within a campaign.
tasks.details:
1. Develop member management UI in `src/app/campaigns/[id]/members/page.tsx`.
2. Implement shared NPC editing and session management.
3. Restrict campaign deletion to owners only.
tasks.testStrategy: Test role changes, member management, and co-DM functionalities. Ensure permissions are correctly enforced.

tasks.title: Develop Public Homebrew Sharing
tasks.description: Allow homebrew content to be shared publicly.
tasks.details:
1. Update `prisma/schema.prisma` with `ContentVisibility` and `ContentFavorite` models.
2. Implement public homebrew browser in `src/app/homebrew/browse/page.tsx`.
3. Develop creator profiles in `src/app/creators/[username]/page.tsx`.
tasks.testStrategy: Test visibility settings and public access to homebrew content. Validate creator profile displays and interactions.

tasks.title: Implement Live Session Features
tasks.description: Support real-time session features like transcription and dice rolling.
tasks.details:
1. Expand WebSocket infrastructure with Redis PubSub.
2. Develop live session dashboard in `src/app/campaigns/[id]/live/page.tsx`.
3. Implement live transcription and dice rolling features.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct live session simulations to test real-time features. Validate WebSocket connections and data flow.

tasks.title: Build Content Marketplace
tasks.description: Create a marketplace for content creators to publish and share homebrew.
tasks.details:
1. Develop publishing workflow with draft, review, and published states.
2. Implement analytics dashboard for creators.
3. Create collections/bundles feature for related content.
tasks.testStrategy: Test content publishing, analytics tracking, and bundle creation. Ensure marketplace functionality and security.

tasks.title: Integrate Discord Bot
tasks.description: Develop a Discord bot for session recaps and notifications.
tasks.details:
1. Implement Discord bot commands for scheduling, recaps, and dice rolls.
2. Set up webhooks for session reminders and announcements.
3. Link Discord server to campaigns via `/quiver link`.
tasks.testStrategy: Test bot commands and webhook notifications in a Discord server. Validate integration and user interactions.

tasks.title: Implement Calendar Sync
tasks.description: Sync session schedules with external calendars.
tasks.details:
1. Develop calendar sync endpoints in `src/server/routers/calendar.ts`.
2. Support Google Calendar and iCal feed URL.
3. Auto-create and update calendar events for sessions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test calendar sync with Google Calendar and iCal. Verify event creation, updates, and deletions.

tasks.title: Develop VTT Integration
tasks.description: Integrate with virtual tabletops like Foundry and Roll20.
tasks.details:
1. Implement export/import utilities for Foundry and Roll20.
2. Develop character sheet sync and campaign linking features.
3. Start with export/import before real-time sync.
tasks.testStrategy: Test VTT export/import functionality. Validate character and campaign data integrity across platforms.

tasks.title: Enhance Mobile-First Design
tasks.description: Ensure all features are optimized for mobile use.
tasks.details:
1. Apply Tailwind responsive utilities across all components.
2. Test on actual devices for touch-friendly design.
3. Implement PWA for offline character sheets.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct usability testing on various mobile devices. Validate offline capabilities and touch interactions.

tasks.title: Implement AI Session Summaries
tasks.details:
1. Use existing AI integration to analyze transcripts.
2. Generate structured summaries for DM review.
3. Publish summaries to players after review.
tasks.testStrategy: Test AI-generated summaries for accuracy and coherence. Validate DM review and publishing workflow.

tasks.title: Develop Onboarding Wizard
tasks.description: Guide new users through initial setup and campaign creation.
tasks.details:
1. Implement onboarding wizard in `src/app/onboarding/page.tsx`.
2. Provide guided setup for DMs and players.
3. Include campaign templates and import options.
tasks.testStrategy: Test onboarding flow for both DMs and players. Validate template selection and content import functionality.
